nota: Oráculo re-modelado bajo knowledge contract. MISMAS 14 preguntas que sintesis_oracle.json (congeladas). Cambian: los hechos (absolutos, con links markdown a concept-ids para las cadenas) y la colección (aurora3, creada CON contrato). f2 re-modelado de relacional a absoluto (el viejo violaría kc-relative). f4 reformulado a horas para cumplir el regex conservando síntesis real. Tier efectivo de a1 pasa de aritmética a lookup — ese ES el efecto medible del contrato.

facts_md.f1: The Aurora API gateway listens on port 7443
facts_md.f2: The Aurora metrics service listens on port 7444
facts_md.f3: Aurora production releases happen every second Thursday
facts_md.f4: The Aurora code freeze starts 72 hours prior to each production release
facts_md.f5: The stormdb database runs on the host named [vega](f6)
facts_md.f6: The host vega is mounted in rack [R2](f7)
facts_md.f7: Rack R2 is located in the Quito datacenter
facts_md.f8: The Aurora team lead is Ryn Castellanos
facts_md.f9: The Aurora on-call rotation is documented in runbook page RB-114
facts_md.f10: Every Aurora deploy requires approval from the Aurora [team lead](f8)
facts_md.f11: The flagpole tool manages Aurora feature flags
facts_md.f12: Aurora feature flags can only be changed during a [code freeze](f4)
facts_md.f13: The Aurora error budget is 43 minutes of downtime per month
facts_md.f14: Aurora has consumed 28 minutes of its error budget this month

preguntas_ref: usar las 14 de sintesis_oracle.json sin cambios (ids, tiers, keywords, expected_number). needed_facts actualizados solo para a1: [f2].
